title: zizania retzii
intro: Zizania retzii, also known as wild rice, is a type of aquatic grass that is native to the Old World tropics. The medicinal properties of Zizania retzii include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of consuming Zizania retzii include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, regulate blood sugar, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Zizania retzii are often used in traditional medicine, and can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and decoctions.
